introSection: Family Worm is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Family Park in Medulin, Istria County, Croatia.

sections.title: Train
sections.content: The train is designed to resemble a caterpillar.

fullText:
Family Worm is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Family Park in Medulin, Istria County, Croatia.



Yellow track and unpainted supports.

The train is designed to resemble a caterpillar.
